summary: Executed backend-only regression validation for Android template mount timing/order and workflow inline transformation. All targeted checks passed.
action_items: Run GitHub Actions Android build to confirm runtime behavior in real APK/WebView, since this run is static/parser-level regression testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Added explicit regression checks for mount timing/order: no pre-inline mount invocation, required post-inline trigger, and transformed inline createPatchView definition occurring before mount trigger execution.
rca of the issue: The original blank UI symptom is consistent with mount timing/order regression: if mount executes before inline view.js assigns window.createPatchView, root renders 'createPatchView() not found'. Current index/workflow state defers mount via window.mountPatchView and triggers it only after inline script block, preventing that race.
